meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-07 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Textbook recovery morning: 7h58 at score 91 — the best night of the week — off a 23:10 bedtime. Deep sleep rebounded to 1h27, nearly triple Sunday's thin 46 minutes, and REM was a healthy 2h03, so the sleep architecture is excellent. The autonomic side is a touch softer: HRV eased to 43 (−8 from the previous night's 51, right on the 7-day average) and RHR ticked to 53 — both normal after a full training week rather than red flags. Morning stress is a calm 17. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Mon 6 (Monday–Tuesday); Thursday's night (Jul 2) remains the untracked slot on the chart. Yesterday was a rest day, so with a long, high-quality night behind you the tank is full heading into today's planned hack-squat session.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Udžbenički oporavak: 7h58 uz ocjenu 91 — najbolja noć tjedna — i lijeganje u 23:10. Duboki san se vratio na 1h27, gotovo trostruko naspram nedjeljinih tankih 46 minuta, a REM je bio zdravih 2h03, pa je arhitektura sna izvrsna. Autonomna slika je malo mekša: HRV se spustio na 43 (−8 u odnosu na prethodnu noć 51, točno na 7-dnevnom prosjeku), a RHR se popeo na 53 — oboje normalno nakon punog tjedna treninga, ne alarm. Jutarnji stres miran 17. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Pon 6 (ponedjeljak–utorak); četvrtkova noć (2.7.) i dalje je nezabilježeni termin na grafu. Jučer je bio dan odmora, pa je uz dugu, kvalitetnu noć spremnik pun uoči današnjeg planiranog hack squata.
